appearanceNotes: Scarred captain with basalt-scale armor and a disciplined military bearing.
personalityNotes: Blunt, protective, practical, and suspicious of theatrical heroics.
relationshipSummary: Serves Prince-Consort Oren and trains Crown Prince Kaelen.
notes: Anchors the Furnace Guard Trial and city defense drills.

appearanceNotes: Stocky engineer with soot goggles, heat-resistant gloves, and brass valve tools.
personalityNotes: Gruff, brilliant, sleep-deprived, and secretly sentimental.
relationshipSummary: Reports to Queen Seraphine during volcanic emergencies and trades techniques with Metal Capital engineers.
notes: Central to volcano pressure quests and evacuation-route gameplay.

appearanceNotes: Warm-eyed market cook with a charred apron, spice pouches, and a portable stone grill.
personalityNotes: Kind, loud, generous, and excellent at overhearing palace gossip.
relationshipSummary: Feeds guards, merchants, and displaced families during evacuation drills.
notes: Gives food-based recovery items and social clues.

appearanceNotes: Shrine keeper in translucent heat-glass beads and ember-white robes.
personalityNotes: Gentle, exacting, ritual-minded, and capable of terrifying moral clarity.
relationshipSummary: Trusted by Princess Lyra and Dowager Maelis as a keeper of old vows.
notes: Good for memory, history, and fire-as-responsibility quest hooks.

appearanceNotes: Lean courier with ash-streaked goggles and a scarf that never stops moving.
personalityNotes: Fast-talking, anxious, brave, and very proud of knowing every shortcut.
relationshipSummary: Works with Boros and Talia during volcanic emergencies.
